name: Grade 5 Language Arts — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 5 pathway for argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 5 knowledge and transferable skills in argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 5 task connected to argument, explanatory writing, narrative craft, research, and citations.
